query: SELECT p.id, p.numeroCnj, p.tipoAcao, p.faseAtual, p.statusProcesso, c.nomeCompleto as clienteNome, c.cpfCnpj, LENGTH(p.textoExtraido) as tamanhoTexto FROM processos p LEFT JOIN clientes c ON p.clienteId = c.id ORDER BY p.id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT p.id, p.numeroCnj, p.tipoAcao, p.faseAtual, p.statusProcesso, c.nomeCompleto as clienteNome, c.cpfCnpj, LENGTH(p.textoExtraido) as tamanhoTexto FROM processos p LEFT JOIN clientes c ON p.clienteId = c.id ORDER BY p.id
